summary: Plan-only classification for 40 open PRs. No shared canonical was invented and no GitHub mutation is planned. Security-shaped items are routed individually; ready independent PRs needing maintainer judgment are marked needs_human; all other PRs are kept independent.

actions.reason: Security/auth/secret/path-boundary shaped PR; route only this item to central OpenClaw security handling.
